title: limonium delicatulum subsp. formenterae
intro: Limonium delicatulum subsp. formenterae, also known as Formentera sea lavender, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Formentera sea lavender include its potential to alleviate anxiety, improve sleep quality, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
